opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I'm passing drops of blood every ten minutes, it feels like razor blades when I wee, and I'm exhausted from sitting on the toilet all night.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The burning and the bleeding are unbearable and I haven't slept a wink — I need something to settle it before the daytime clinics open.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on over this evening and has got steadily worse tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: all night — several hours and not letting up
symptom_narrative.character: an agonising burning, like razor blades, every time I pass urine
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst burning I've ever had — I can't rest and I'm near tears
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: down below when I wee, and a dull heavy ache low in my belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: I'm needing to go every ten minutes, with a sudden desperate urge, and it never feels like I've fully emptied
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: almost nothing — the over-the-counter urinary sachets barely touched it, and drinking water hasn't helped much
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: actually passing urine is the worst part, and it's constant
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: my urine is cloudy and smells really foul, and there are drops of blood in it — that's what's frightening me the most
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I keep getting these bladder/water infections — I've had four in the last year, each one confirmed on a urine test, and I'm completely fine in between. They often flare up a day or so after sex.
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've been up all night on or near the toilet and I'm completely wiped out — I can't function

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recurrent bladder / water infections — about four in the past year, each one confirmed on a urine test, fully resolving between episodes

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the infections often flare a day or so after sexual intercourse; not on any regular preventive antibiotic

objective_data_offered.value: my urine is cloudy and foul-smelling and there are visible drops of blood in it each time I go
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own visual description of the urine; not a laboratory or dipstick result

objective_data_offered.value: I don't feel hot or feverish and I'm not having shaking chills, and I don't have any pain in my back
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-report only; no home thermometer reading offered
